lesson_title: Compare Fractions with the Same Denominator
objective: Compare two fractions with the same denominator using models and symbols (>, <, =)

pretest.question: Sam ate 5/8 of a pie. Kai ate 2/8 of the same pie. Who ate more?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.9 Lesson 9.2 'Compare Fractions with the Same Denominator' pp.357-360
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 같은 분모 규칙 — 분자만 비교
learn.content: When two fractions have the SAME DENOMINATOR, the pieces are the same size. You just compare how many pieces each fraction has — that's the numerator. More pieces = greater fraction. Example: 2/8 vs 6/8 → same size pieces, but 6 pieces > 2 pieces, so 6/8 > 2/8. 예: Which is greater: 3/6 or 5/6? → 5/6. (Same denominator (6). 5 pieces > 3 pieces → 5/6 > 3/6.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.9 Lesson 9.2 'Compare Fractions with the Same Denominator' pp.357-360
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 분수 스트립 — 시각적 비교
learn.content: You can use a fraction strip to see this. Imagine a bar split into 4 equal parts. Color 1 part → 1/4. Color 3 parts → 3/4. The bar with 3 parts colored is clearly more filled. So 3/4 > 1/4. 예: A bar is split into 8 equal parts. One shows 2/8 colored, another shows 7/8 colored. Which is greater? → 7/8. (7 parts colored > 2 parts colored → 7/8 > 2/8.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.9 Lesson 9.2 'Compare Fractions with the Same Denominator' pp.357-360
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 같은 분수 — 분자도 같으면 =
learn.content: If both fractions have the same numerator AND the same denominator, they are equal. Example: 3/4 = 3/4. This also works in word problems: if two people each eat 2/6 of the same cake, they ate the same amount. 예: Compare: 5/8 ○ 5/8 → =. (Same denominator, same numerator → equal fractions.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.9 Lesson 9.2 'Compare Fractions with the Same Denominator' pp.357-360
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 분자 = 조각 개수 — 많을수록 큼
learn.content: 같은 분모 분수에서 분자는 '조각 개수'를 의미. 조각 크기가 같으니 개수가 많을수록 합도 큼.   3/8 = 1/8짜리 조각 3개.   5/8 = 1/8짜리 조각 5개. 5개 > 3개 → 5/8 > 3/8. 🔍 분자 비교 = 자연수 비교.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.9 Lesson 9.2 'Compare Fractions with the Same Denominator' pp.357-360
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 끝점 분수 — 0/b와 b/b
learn.content: 같은 분모 분수의 양 끝:   0/b = 0 (조각 없음, 가장 작음).   b/b = 1 (전체, 가장 큼). 예: 분모 4 → 0/4 = 0, 4/4 = 1. 그 사이 1/4, 2/4, 3/4. 🔍 비교 시: 0/b가 가장 작고 b/b가 가장 큼.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.9 Lesson 9.2 'Compare Fractions with the Same Denominator' pp.357-360
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 같은 분모 비교 3단계 루틴
learn.content: 두 분수 비교 3단계:   단계 1) 분모가 같은지 확인.   단계 2) 같다면 → 분자만 비교.   단계 3) 분자 큰 쪽이 큰 분수, 같으면 =. 예: 3/8 vs 7/8 → 1) 분모 같음 ✓, 2) 3 vs 7, 3) 3 < 7 → 3/8 < 7/8.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.9 Lesson 9.2 'Compare Fractions with the Same Denominator' pp.357-360
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 여러 분수 정렬 — 분자 순서대로
learn.content: 같은 분모 분수를 작은 것부터 정렬할 때 분자만 보면 됨. 예: 1/6, 5/6, 2/6, 4/6 → 분자: 1, 5, 2, 4. 정렬: 1 < 2 < 4 < 5 → 1/6 < 2/6 < 4/6 < 5/6. 🔍 단축 방법: 분자만 보고 자연수 정렬처럼.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.9 Lesson 9.2 'Compare Fractions with the Same Denominator' pp.357-360
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 그림으로 검산 — 막대/원 비교
learn.content: 두 분수가 진짜 다른지 그림으로 확인 가능:   같은 길이의 막대 두 개를 모두 b등분.   각 분수의 색칠 부분 길이를 옆으로 맞춰 비교. 예: 2/6 vs 4/6 → 4/6 막대가 더 길게 색칠 → 4/6이 큼. 🔍 그림 비교 = 정확하지만 느림 → 빠른 분자 비교가 우선.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.9 Lesson 9.2 'Compare Fractions with the Same Denominator' pp.357-360
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

try.question: Look at the fraction strips. Strip A shows 3/8 shaded. Strip B shows 6/8 shaded. Compare: 3/8 ○ 6/8
try.hint: Count the shaded parts. Which strip has more shaded?
guided_steps: Step 1: Both strips are split into 8 equal parts (same denominator).
Step 2: Strip A has 3 parts shaded. Strip B has 6 parts shaded.

practice_r3.question: Leo says 2/8 > 5/8 because 2 comes first when you count. Is Leo correct? Explain.
practice_r3.answer: Leo is NOT correct. With the same denominator, the greater numerator means more pieces. 5 > 2, so 5/8 > 2/8.
